name: The Creative
description: Bold initiative drives career growth, sharpens leadership, and opens money opportunities when relationships support your vision.

name: The Receptive
description: Patience and support bring steady career progress, calmer relationships, and better money decisions through quiet strength.

name: Difficulty at the Beginning
description: Early career setbacks, fragile relationships, or money stress improve through persistence, planning, and asking for help.

name: Youthful Folly
description: Inexperience in career, relationships, or money calls for learning, humility, and better questions before taking action.

name: Waiting
description: A stalled career move, uncertain relationships, or delayed money matter benefits from patience, timing, and inner calm.

name: Conflict
description: Career disputes, relationship tension, or money arguments need clear boundaries, fairness, and restraint to avoid damage.

name: The Army
description: Discipline and shared purpose strengthen career teams, stabilize relationships, and help money goals succeed under firm leadership.

name: Holding Together
description: Trust and loyalty improve career alliances, deepen relationships, and support money success through the right partnerships.

name: The Taming Power of the Small
description: Small career wins, gentle relationship effort, and careful money habits create progress through patience and steady influence.

name: Treading
description: Careful conduct protects career progress, eases relationship tension, and prevents money mistakes when stakes feel high.

name: Peace
description: Harmony supports career flow, balanced relationships, and healthy money growth as the right people and timing align.

name: Standstill
description: Blocked career plans, distant relationships, or stuck money matters call for patience, integrity, and avoiding wasted effort.

name: Fellowship with Men
description: Shared values strengthen career networks, improve relationships, and open money opportunities through honest collaboration.

name: Possession in Great Measure
description: Career success, strong relationships, and money abundance grow when generosity, clarity, and responsibility guide power.

name: Modesty
description: Humility earns career respect, steadies relationships, and protects money gains by keeping ego and excess in check.

name: Enthusiasm
description: Inspired energy lifts career momentum, rallies relationships, and attracts money opportunities when focused on a shared goal.

name: Following
description: Adapting wisely helps career progress, smooths relationships, and improves money results when you follow what is true.

name: Work on What Has Been Spoiled
description: Old career problems, strained relationships, or money mistakes can be repaired by facing the root cause directly.

name: Approach
description: A promising career opening, warming relationships, or improving money outlook grows through openness, kindness, and timing.

name: Contemplation
description: Step back to review career direction, relationship patterns, and money habits before making a visible next move.

name: Biting Through
description: Career obstacles, relationship dishonesty, or money disputes require decisive action and a clean break through confusion.

name: Grace
description: Presentation matters in career, relationships, and money talks, but lasting success still depends on substance beneath style.

name: Splitting Apart
description: When career security weakens, relationships fray, or money drains, let go of what no longer has solid support.

name: Return
description: A fresh career start, renewed relationships, or recovering money luck begins by returning to what is essential.

name: Innocence
description: Honesty in career, relationships, and money brings protection, while manipulative moves backfire despite good intentions.

name: The Taming Power of the Great
description: Stored strength favors career mastery, mature relationships, and disciplined money growth built on restraint and preparation.

name: Corners of the Mouth
description: What you consume and say shapes career health, relationships, and money choices, so nourish wisely and speak with care.

name: Preponderance of the Great
description: Heavy pressure in career, relationships, or money demands bold support, structural change, and strength under strain.

name: The Abysmal
description: Repeated career stress, relationship fear, or money risk is navigated by courage, consistency, and staying true in danger.

name: The Clinging
description: Clarity and commitment light the way in career decisions, relationships, and money plans when truth is sustained.

name: Influence
description: Mutual attraction shapes relationships, career alliances, and money choices, so lead with sincerity rather than pressure.

name: Duration
description: Lasting career success, dependable relationships, and stable money grow from consistency, loyalty, and steady habits.

name: Retreat
description: Step back from a draining career battle, tense relationships, or risky money move to protect strength and timing.

name: The Power of the Great
description: Strong career momentum, passionate relationships, or money ambition succeed when power is guided by restraint.

name: Progress
description: Recognition in career, warmer relationships, and money improvement arrive as your efforts become visible and valued.

name: Darkening of the Light
description: Protect your career position, vulnerable relationships, and money security by staying discreet in a hostile climate.

name: The Family
description: Order at home supports relationships, career duty, and money stability when each person honors their role.

name: Opposition
description: Differences in career goals, relationships, or money priorities can be useful if you seek clarity, not control.

name: Obstruction
description: Career delays, relationship distance, or money blocks call for help, rerouting, and honest assessment of limits.

name: Deliverance
description: Relief follows career pressure, relationship conflict, or money burdens when you resolve what has been weighing you down.

name: Decrease
description: Simplifying career plans, relationship expectations, or money spending creates space for what truly matters to grow.

name: Increase
description: Career opportunities expand, relationships strengthen, and money improves when generosity and smart effort move together.

name: Breakthrough
description: A career truth, relationship boundary, or money issue must be stated clearly now to end hidden problems.

name: Coming to Meet
description: A tempting career offer, relationship spark, or money opportunity needs caution before desire gains too much power.

name: Gathering Together
description: Community support boosts career aims, heals relationships, and strengthens money plans when people unite around purpose.

name: Pushing Upward
description: Steady effort brings career advancement, deeper relationships, and money growth through patience, respect, and persistence.

name: Oppression
description: Career strain, relationship loneliness, or money pressure tests resolve, but inner strength can outlast hard limits.

name: The Well
description: Shared resources, reliable relationships, and career purpose thrive when the source is maintained and used well.

name: Revolution
description: A major career shift, relationship reset, or money turnaround succeeds when change is timely, honest, and prepared.

name: The Caldron
description: Career transformation, nourishing relationships, and money wisdom grow when raw experience is refined into value.

name: The Arousing
description: A shock in career, relationships, or money can awaken clarity and action if you recover quickly and stay grounded.

name: Keeping Still
description: Stillness helps career judgment, cools relationships, and prevents money errors when emotions push for quick action.

name: Development
description: Gradual career progress, maturing relationships, and steady money gains come through patience and step-by-step growth.

name: The Marrying Maiden
description: A secondary role in career, relationships, or money matters needs realism, tact, and respect for uneven power.

name: Abundance
description: Peak career activity, full relationships, and strong money flow bring success, but clarity is vital amid excess.

name: The Wanderer
description: Travel, career transition, or unstable relationships and money call for caution, courtesy, and light attachment.

name: The Gentle
description: Subtle influence improves career negotiations, relationships, and money habits through patience, tact, and quiet persistence.

name: The Joyous
description: Open communication boosts career teamwork, warms relationships, and helps money talks when joy stays sincere.

name: Dispersion
description: Career confusion, relationship distance, or money tension eases when rigid fear dissolves and people reconnect.

name: Limitation
description: Healthy limits protect career focus, improve relationships, and restore money balance when excess has gone too far.

name: Inner Truth
description: Sincerity guides career choices, deepens relationships, and steadies money decisions when trust comes from within.

name: Preponderance of the Small
description: In career, relationships, or money, careful small steps work better now than grand moves or loud promises.

name: After Completion
description: A career goal, relationship milestone, or money plan is in place, but staying alert prevents backsliding.

name: Before Completion
description: Career, relationships, or money are close to resolution, yet careful timing is needed before crossing the finish line.
